inspectionSpec.description: Reports 'String' concatenation used as the argument to 'StringBuffer.append()', 'StringBuilder.append()' or 'Appendable.append()'. Such calls may profitably be turned into chained append calls on the existing 'StringBuffer/Builder/Appendable' saving the cost of an extra 'StringBuffer/Builder' allocation. This inspection ignores compile-time evaluated 'String' concatenations, in which case the conversion would only worsen performance. Inspection ID: StringConcatenationInsideStringBufferAppend
